title: Modular Building Manufacturer UAE
content:
Fabtech International delivers and finds its niche in Cold Form Steel (CFS) manufacturing service in Dubai. Backed by a team of building manufacturing specialists, we aim to address the growing and raging demand of both temporary and permanent site offices and accommodations. As one of the leading Modular Building Manufacturers in the UAE, we strive to bring forth the most trendsetting, innovative, affordable, and environment-friendly engineering approach in our modular building design service. Our highly virtuous and competent team works together to redefine the modular industry by offering and manufacturing buildings, which are not only affordable and fast track but also environmentally sound and energy efficient.
We combine structural integrity with a high standard of finish to ensure the delivery of well-built structures with durability. All these years, through our carefully regulated operations, both during production and installation, we at Fabtech take pride in being able to reduce our carbon footprint to an appreciable magnitude. Our service is rendered with international standards and modern provisions as we make sure our clients’ architectural vision is not compromised. To learn more about our service, get in touch with our modular building experts, and we’ll guide you through the process.
At our modular construction facility, we manufacture superior and satisfactory sectional buildings, consisting of multiple modules, and deliver them to its intended site of use. Our up-to-date modular manufacturing facility in Dubai allows for trouble-free transportation of finished and final modular buildings (using trailers) to the construction sites throughout the Middle East. The facility’s proximity to JAFZA is another profitable advantage as it allows us to cater to international waters and export our modular buildings to overseas clients. Our facility is well resourced with modern and technologically upgraded equipment like computerized cold form steel framing machines, overhead\gantry cranes, and hot-rolled steel fabrication, to name a few, which ensure smooth construction of custom-built and structurally sound modular buildings.
At our facility, which is counted among one of the most reliable CFS building manufacturing companies in the region, a competent and determined team of engineers and constructors work on different operational activities of various departments. They work on cold form steel framing, carpentry, electrical, fire alarm, plumbing and many other related activities to ensure that your vision is properly embodied in the product.
Usage of prefabricated cold form steel (CFS) design shortens the project’s timeline and ensure the construction workflows more efficiently, thereby allowing the focus to remain on on-site operations.
The construction of the building happens off-site and is only installed after its completion improves operations on-site. It further helps in taking away the worries of the contractors.
The need to acquire expensive, skilled workers, machinery, and material is reduced, which could otherwise occur if you go by the traditional building method.
Steel, the only building material used, is infinitely recyclable and recognized as a green building material. It hence earns credit for sustainability and green building ratings.
Any building that is designed with CFS supports the conservation of energy as high acoustic, and thermal values of CFS enables energy-efficient designs.






MO 304, Jebel Ali free Zone, Dubai, UAE
